name: Apple Dumpling #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out pie dough and cut into 4 equal pieces.
2. Peel and core apples, then sprinkle them with lemon juice.
3. Place 1 apple in the center of each piece of dough.
4. Combine sugar replacement and cinnamon in a bowl, sprinkling evenly into the cavity of apples.
5. Top each apple with 1 tsp (5 mL) margarine.
6. Bring opposite ends of dough up over the apple.
7. Moisten slightly with water; seal securely.
8. Brush with beaten egg white.
9. Place in a shallow baking pan.
10. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 35 to 45 minutes, or until pastry is golden brown.
